config.enabled.name: Enable Mod
config.warp_follow.name: Cross-Map Companion
config.warp_follow.description: Your horse will accompany you across maps only where vanilla horse movement is allowed.
config.follow_on_load.name: Follow ON on Load
config.follow_on_load.description: Start companion mode as ON when a save is loaded.
config.hud_messages.name: HUD Messages
config.hud_messages.description: Show short messages when horse companion mode is turned on or off.
config.toggle_key.name: Companion Toggle Key
config.toggle_key.description: Use this key to turn horse companion mode on or off.
config.follow_start_distance.name: Companion Start Distance
config.follow_start_distance.description: Your horse starts following when it is at least this far away.
config.stop_distance.name: Stop Distance
config.stop_distance.description: Your horse stops when it gets this close to the target position.
config.path_rebuild_seconds.name: Path Rebuild Interval
config.path_rebuild_seconds.description: The minimum number of seconds before the path can be recalculated.
config.near_speed.name: Near Distance Speed Multiplier
config.near_speed.description: Speed multiplier when the horse is nearby.
config.mid_speed.name: Mid Distance Speed Multiplier
config.mid_speed.description: Speed multiplier when the horse is at a medium distance.
config.far_speed.name: Far Distance Speed Multiplier
config.far_speed.description: Speed multiplier when the horse is far away.
config.narrow_hitbox.name: Narrow Hitbox
config.narrow_hitbox.description: Use a narrower hitbox. Enable this if you use a mod that allows horses to pass through 1-tile-wide paths.
config.ignore_player_collision.name: Ignore Player Collision
config.ignore_player_collision.descripti: Disable collision between the horse and the player.
config.auto_enable_follow.name: Enable Follow on Mount / Flute
config.auto_enable_follow.description: Automatically enable companion mode when you mount your horse or summon it with the Horse Flute.
config.warp_effects_and_sound.name: Warp Effects and Sound
config.warp_effects_and_sound.descriptio: Play visual effects and sound when this mod warps your horse.
config.path_abort_distance.name: Pathfinding Abort Distance
config.path_abort_distance.description: If your horse's travel distance reaches this value, follow handling will switch to the abort behavior. Set to 0 to disable.
config.path_failure_action.name: Action on Abort / No Path
config.path_failure_action.description: What to do when no path is found twice in a row, or when the abort distance is reached.
config.disabled_mounts.title: Mounts excluded from follow tracking
config.disabled_mounts.description: Checked mounts will no longer become the active follow target when you ride them.
config.disabled_mounts.helper: Only the checked mounts are excluded from follow tracking.
config.disabled_mounts.entry_tooltip: Check this to exclude the mount from follow tracking.
config.disabled_mounts.empty: No horse-like mounts are currently available. This list refreshes after loading a save and at the start of each day.
